race.comment: KOJAK (1) ran well fresh finishing a three length sixth over 1400m. Fitter and extra trip a plus. Placed only try on heavy ground and expected to go close. BLUE POLES (6) is a progressive type who ran a much better race at second outing finishing a c,ose-up second over 1400m at Bathurst. Heads north and suited by the extra ground. Unknown wet but has upside and can measure up. STEPLIKA LION (10) finished 4.5 lengths away in fourth last time out over 1300m at Toowoomba four weeks ago as $2.8 favourite. Steps up in journey today. Right in this. LA GRACIA (15) could only manage to finish fifth, beaten 5.5 lengths, at her latest appearance over 1690m at Ipswich. Rates highly in this field and can turn things around. SHOW'EM WHO'S KING (4) hasn't been far from the winner at both career starts and is worth following up.
